languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, наше светило! Мой сын, Гнотек, он ранен и умирает, я тащила его сюда на руках, сама, чтобы хирургеоны достали его с того света, пожалуйста, не оставьте нас..." {n}Взгляд женщины мечется с вас на хирургов и обратно, она определенно не в себе.{/n}

"Lord Captain, our guiding light! My son, Gnotec, he's injured and dying. I carried him here in my arms, on my own, so the chirurgeons could pull him back from the brink, please don't leave us..." {n}The woman's gaze swings from you to the chirurgeons and back again — her mental state is obviously unstable.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, наше светило! Мой сын, Гнотек, он ранен и умирает, я тащила его сюда на руках, сама, чтобы хирургеоны достали его с того света, пожалуйста, не оставьте нас..." {n}Взгляд женщины мечется с вас на хирургов и обратно, она определенно не в себе.{/n}

"Lord Captain, our guiding light! My son, Gnotec, he's injured and dying. I carried him here in my arms, on my own, so the chirurgeons could pull him back from the brink, please don't leave us..." {n}The woman's gaze swings from you to the chirurgeons and back again — her mental state is obviously unstable.{/n}

"Lord Captain, our guiding light! My son, Gnotec, he's injured and dying. I carried him here in my arms, on my own, so the chirurgeons could pull him back from the brink, please don't leave us..." {n}The woman's gaze swings from you to the chirurgeons and back again — her mental state is obviously unstable.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain, unsere Lichtgestalt! Mein Sohn, Gnotec, er ist verwundet und stirbt. Ich habe ihn auf meinen Armen hierher getragen, damit ihn die Chirurgeums von der Schwelle zurückholen. Bitte verlasst uns nicht ..." {n}Der Blick der Frau wechselt zwischen dir und den Chirurgeums hin und her ... ihr Geisteszustand ist ganz offensichtlich instabil.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our guiding light! My son, Gnotec, he's injured and dying. I carried him here in my arms, on my own, so the chirurgeons could pull him back from the brink, please don't leave us..." {n}The woman's gaze swings from you to the chirurgeons and back again — her mental state is obviously unstable.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, unsere Lichtgestalt! Mein Sohn, Gnotec, er ist verwundet und stirbt. Ich habe ihn auf meinen Armen hierher getragen, damit ihn die Chirurgeums von der Schwelle zurückholen. Bitte verlasst uns nicht ..." {n}Der Blick der Frau wechselt zwischen dir und den Chirurgeums hin und her ... ihr Geisteszustand ist ganz offensichtlich instabil.{/n}

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, l'étoile qui nous guide ! Mon fils, Gnotec, il est blessé et à l'article de la mort. Je l'ai porté jusqu'ici à moi seule, à la force de mes bras, dans l'espoir que les chirurgeons puissent le sauver. Par pitié, ne nous abandonnez pas... » {n}Le regard de la femme alterne frénétiquement entre vous et les chirurgeons, preuve de la confusion mentale qui est la sienne.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our guiding light! My son, Gnotec, he's injured and dying. I carried him here in my arms, on my own, so the chirurgeons could pull him back from the brink, please don't leave us..." {n}The woman's gaze swings from you to the chirurgeons and back again — her mental state is obviously unstable.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, l'étoile qui nous guide ! Mon fils, Gnotec, il est blessé et à l'article de la mort. Je l'ai porté jusqu'ici à moi seule, à la force de mes bras, dans l'espoir que les chirurgeons puissent le sauver. Par pitié, ne nous abandonnez pas... » {n}Le regard de la femme alterne frénétiquement entre vous et les chirurgeons, preuve de la confusion mentale qui est la sienne.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人，我们的指路明灯！我的儿子诺泰克受伤了，他快死了。是我亲手把他抱到这儿来的，好让船医们把他从鬼门关拉回来，求您不要不管我们……”{n}那女人的目光在你和船医们之间来回游移，她的精神状态显然很不稳定。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our guiding light! My son, Gnotec, he's injured and dying. I carried him here in my arms, on my own, so the chirurgeons could pull him back from the brink, please don't leave us..." {n}The woman's gaze swings from you to the chirurgeons and back again — her mental state is obviously unstable.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我们的指路明灯！我的儿子诺泰克受伤了，他快死了。是我亲手把他抱到这儿来的，好让船医们把他从鬼门关拉回来，求您不要不管我们……”{n}那女人的目光在你和船医们之间来回游移，她的精神状态显然很不稳定。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán, nuestra luz guía! Mi hijo, Gnotec, está herido de muerte. Lo he traído aquí en mis brazos, en solitario, para que los cirujanos pudieran traerlo de vuelta. Por favor, no nos abandone...». {n}La mujer primero te mira a ti, luego a los cirujanos, y de vuelta a ti. Su estado mental es evidentemente inestable.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our guiding light! My son, Gnotec, he's injured and dying. I carried him here in my arms, on my own, so the chirurgeons could pull him back from the brink, please don't leave us..." {n}The woman's gaze swings from you to the chirurgeons and back again — her mental state is obviously unstable.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán, nuestra luz guía! Mi hijo, Gnotec, está herido de muerte. Lo he traído aquí en mis brazos, en solitario, para que los cirujanos pudieran traerlo de vuelta. Por favor, no nos abandone...». {n}La mujer primero te mira a ti, luego a los cirujanos, y de vuelta a ti. Su estado mental es evidentemente inestable.{/n}

languages.text: 「ロード・キャプテン、私たちの導きの光！息子のグノテックが、傷ついて死にかけているんです。外科医が彼を瀬戸際から引き戻してくれるよう、私はこの腕に抱いて、たった一人でここまで運んできました。どうか、どうか私たちを見捨てないで…」{n}女の視線はあなたから外科医へ、そしてまた戻る――その精神状態は明らかに不安定だ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our guiding light! My son, Gnotec, he's injured and dying. I carried him here in my arms, on my own, so the chirurgeons could pull him back from the brink, please don't leave us..." {n}The woman's gaze swings from you to the chirurgeons and back again — her mental state is obviously unstable.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ロード・キャプテン、私たちの導きの光！息子のグノテックが、傷ついて死にかけているんです。外科医が彼を瀬戸際から引き戻してくれるよう、私はこの腕に抱いて、たった一人でここまで運んできました。どうか、どうか私たちを見捨てないで…」{n}女の視線はあなたから外科医へ、そしてまた戻る――その精神状態は明らかに不安定だ。{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, rehber ışığımız! Oğlum Gnotec yaralı ve ölüyor. Cerrahlar onu ölümün kıyısından çekip alsın diye onu buraya kadar tek başıma, kollarımda taşıdım. Yalvarırım bizi bırakmayın..." {n}Kadının bakışları senden cerrahlara ve oradan tekrar sana kayıyor. Pek dengeli bir ruh hâlinde değil.{/n}
